Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Maintaining The Current Trial Date With Preference
Off Calendar Jun-06-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Geoff T. Sloniker of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff and moving party Dennis Porter
Constance Fraenkel of SPANOS | PRZETAK (510-250-0200), Designated Defense Counsel
Peter Soskin of K&L GATES LLP (415-882-8200), appearing for defendant Crane co.

RULING: NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR ORDER MAINTAINING THE CURRENT TRIAL DATE WITH PREFERENCE
Hearing held, argued and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff's motion to maintain the trial date with preference is granted pursuant to C.C.P. 36(a). No opposition filed. The February 13, 2018 trial date is maintained with preference status. The July 16, 2018 return holding date is vacated and the new return holding date is September 24, 2018 at 11:15a.m. in Department 503. Last day pursuant to C.C.P. 36(f) is October 4, 2018. All pre-trial dates and deadlines remain dictated by the February 13, 2018 trial date. Plaintiff to make a settlement demand on defendants no later than August 10, 2018. Responses to the demand are due no later than August 24, 2018. The parties are ordered to provide confidential settlement demands stating their best and final offers. These confidential demands must be submitted to Commissioner Pang Ly via electronic mail by September 17, 2018 at 2:00p.m. Mandatory settlement conference with only the attorneys present and final decision makers available by phone is set for Thursday, September 20, 2018 at 9:30 a.m. in 603.
Order signed in open court. Judge: Lynn O'Malley-Taylor, Reporter: Mary Dutra of AIKEN WELCH, CSR 251 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/LOT)
